title: Can Super Forms capture the user and use it for user related drop downs in a field
excerpt: We have jobs linked to users and when entering expenses in Super Forms we need only those jobs to be available which are linked to the user logged in.

posts.author: SThakkar1 (Subash Thakkar)
posts.cookedHtml: We have jobs linked to users and when entering expenses in Super Forms we need only those jobs to be available which are linked to the user logged in.
